Off Calendar Jul-02-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: David Owens appearing for Evelyne Kemper. Daniel Conrad appearing for Doreen Confino. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for petitioner. Mr. Ferdon has filed the supplemental declaration regarding the time. Oral arguments presented by all counsel. Matter submitted.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Deborah Neville CSR# 9703. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Saephan.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Continued To May-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon (Counsel for the San Francisco Public Administrator, Personal Representative); Daniel Conrad (Counsel for Doreen Confino, Objector).

The Court noted the absence of specific time allocations for the extraordinary fees requested by the Public Administrator. Mr. Ferdon noted to his consternation that under the facts of this case (which he then recited) that this request was somewhat burdensome, requesting that the Objectors appear in person to explain their objections. The Court declined that invitation, requesting that the Public Guardian provide the required time allocations. the hearing was continued to May 21, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to allow sufficient time to provide the requested information.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

Off Calendar Jan-03-2007 Continued To Feb-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Ferdon appearing for administrator. Counsel reported to the Court that the real property in Lassen County have been sold and they have the funds. He will file the supplemental accounting. Matter is continued to 2/7/07.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Conrad appearing for intestate heirs. David Owens appearing for intestate heirs. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for administrator. The administrator wants to sell the parcels in Lassen County without court confirmation because the value is little. The heirs agree to sell the parcels without court confirmation. They don't want the parcels distribute to them in kind. Mr. Ferdon will file a status report and supplemental account by 1/3/07. This petition is granted. Mr. Ferdon will prepare an order. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
